comments.author: @kurthanssen2131
comments.text: I'm from Oslo, Norway,  but something many are not aware of is the fact that Socialism is the European word for Communism, and the US word for Communism is Liberalism. When they started to take half of my salary in taxes, plus the 25% sales tax (MOMS), it left me very little for bills and personal expenses. No wonder Norway is the most expensive country in the world, next to Japan. Well, I packed my bags and moved to Miami, and there I put together 4 jewelry stores, something impossible in Norway. Now I'm retired, and I'm living on the Central West Coast of Florida, in the Tampa area. I escaped Communism.

replies.author: @AmazingGlobalDiscoveries
replies.text: I’m glad you were able to build a new life in Florida and create something successful with your jewelry stores. That is truly inspiring. Norway is admired for many things, but every country has its challenges too. What do you miss most about Oslo, if anything, after all these years?

comments.author: @tiredlawdog
comments.text:
Sure wished you'd consider turning that racket down in the "background". Too damned loud.
I could only make it to 15 minutes of that racket. I think my pulse jumped up 20 points

replies.author: @AmazingGlobalDiscoveries
replies.text: Thank you for telling me honestly. That’s helpful feedback, and I’ll definitely keep it in mind for the next videos so the narration is easier to enjoy. Norway’s beauty should feel relaxing, not stressful. I appreciate you still giving the video a try.
